LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS YOUNG FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AND ALICE YOUNG'S JOINDER TO PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. THE ARBITRATION PROVISION DOES NOT RELATE TO PLAINTIFF'S THREE CAUSES OF ACTION AT THIS POINT. IT MAY BE THAT AFTER THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION IS RESOLVED THAT THERE WOULD BE A BASIS FOR INVOKING THE ARBITRATION PROVISION AND THIS RULING IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO DO SO UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1281.2.
